calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Feb-18-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of an Adult and a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Cui Fen Yu was present in pro per as Guardian Ad Litem for the minor Ye Liang Huang, who was also present at today's hearing.
The minor's father was also present at today's hearing.
Petitioner and the minor were placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Tracy Cui Fen Yu.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minor to: Daniel Ye Liang Huang.

Decree Changing Names were submitted to and signed by the Court.
